# 美团主题 `meituan`

品牌黄，来自美团标志色，深色文字保持可读性。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #F0A500;
    --primary-dark:  #C07800;
    --primary-light: #FFC233;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF9E0;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(240, 165, 0, 0.15);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #5C3A00 0%, #9A6200 35%, #D08800 65%, #F0A500 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #5C3A00 0%, #9A6200 50%, #D08800 100%);
    --red:           #E1251B;
    --green:         #0DAD5B;
    --orange:        #F0A500;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5C3A00 0%, #9A6200 50%, #D08800 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #5C3A00 0%, #9A6200 35%, #D08800 65%, #F0A500 100%) !important; }
```
